text: Sanarwa: asusunka na Zenith Bank ya shiga matsala saboda BVN ba a sabunta ba. Danna nan http://uba-update-service.xyz don gyarawa ko a rufe asusunka na dindindin.

Iro ni won pa! Iwe iroyin lati EFCC wipe a ti block account re ni Zenith Bank. Pe nọmba yii 08031234567 lati ṣii bayi ki owo re ma baa sọnu.
